title: hieracium conspurcans subsp. phrixocomum
intro: Hieracium conspurcans subsp. phrixocomum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to mountainous regions. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hieracium conspurcans subsp. phrixocomum are said to benefit digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable plant for herbal remedies. This plant can be prepared as a tincture or tea for internal use, and as a topical ointment for external applications.
